session_flip_note: Backend /auth/me always returned suresh@nulogic.io with RECRUITMENT_ADMIN across checks. However frontend middleware bounced to /auth/login despite valid session, triggered by repeated POST /auth/refresh 401.

pages_tested.note: Loaded; APIs job-openings, departments, employees all 200. /auth/refresh 401 observed (non-blocking on initial render).
First nav redirected to /auth/login. Re-nav reached URL but rendered 'Access Denied - You don't have permission to access this page' while backend APIs for recruitment returned 200. BUG-W3-01 P1.
